phone_presence_notes: Exceptional patience on a 35-minute call with a highly detailed and uncertain customer — consistently warm, never rushed, and kept the customer comfortable throughout.
top_strength: Exceptional patience on 35-minute call with high-maintenance customer — covered packing options, drawer handling, box sourcing without losing composure.
coaching_note: 3 big differentiators (No Worries, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee) never mentioned — exactly the value items that justify the price on a complex move.
